name: Google Maps Platform API
what_it_does: Google's comprehensive mapping platform providing geocoding, reverse geocoding, directions, distance matrix, places search, and static/dynamic maps APIs for location-aware applications.
use_cases: Geocoding addresses to coordinates in agent workflows
Calculating routes and travel times between locations
Searching for places (businesses, points of interest) by name or category
Distance matrix calculations for logistics optimization
not_for: Custom map styling for embedded map UIs (complex)
Teams with tight budgets at high query volumes (pricing adds up quickly)
best_when: An agent needs geocoding, routing, or places data and you want the most comprehensive and accurate location dataset globally.
avoid_when: You need cost control at high volume or want to avoid Google vendor lock-in.

auth.notes: API key in query parameter or header. Restriction by HTTP referrer or IP recommended. Simple for agents. Billing account required even for free tier.

pricing.free_tier_limits: $200/month free credit (~40k geocoding requests or 10k directions requests)
pricing.paid_tiers: Geocoding: $5/1000 requests; Directions: $5/1000; Places: $17-32/1000 depending on field mask
pricing.notes: $200/month free credit covers most small-scale usage. Requires credit card even for free tier. Costs can escalate quickly with high-volume agent queries.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Clear status field (OK, ZERO_RESULTS, OVER_QUERY_LIMIT, etc.) plus error_message field. Excellent documentation.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: All GET requests are fully idempotent - same input produces same output.
known_agent_gotchas: Requires credit card for API key even if staying within $200/month free credit
Places API field masks required or charged for all fields - expensive if not specified
Geocoding results may return multiple candidates - agent must select the best match
Distance Matrix API has element limits per request (100 origins x destinations)
API key must be restricted to prevent unauthorized use and unexpected bills
